results.compiled_code:
SELECT
  team_name,
  rank,
  points,
  played,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  goals_for,
  goals_against,
  goals_diff,
  form,
  CASE team_name
    WHEN 'Paris Saint Germain' THEN 'PSG'
    WHEN 'Lyon'                THEN 'OL'
    WHEN 'Marseille'           THEN 'OM'
    WHEN 'Monaco'              THEN 'ASM'
    WHEN 'Lens'                THEN 'Lens'
    WHEN 'Lille'               THEN 'LOSC'
    WHEN 'Nice'                THEN 'Nice'
    WHEN 'Stade Brestois 29'   THEN 'Brest'
    WHEN 'Strasbourg'          THEN 'Strasbourg'
    WHEN 'Montpellier'         THEN 'MHSC'
    WHEN 'Toulouse'            THEN 'TFC'
    WHEN 'Saint Etienne'       THEN 'ASSE'
  ELSE team_name
END AS team_short
FROM `football-dashboard-490415`.`football_raw`.`standings`
ORDER BY rank ASC

WITH raw AS (
  SELECT * FROM `football-dashboard-490415`.`football_raw`.`fixtures`
)
SELECT
  fixture.id                          AS fixture_id,
  fixture.date                        AS match_date,
  fixture.status.short                AS status,
  league.round                        AS round,
  teams.home.id                       AS home_team_id,
  teams.home.name                     AS home_team_name,
  teams.away.id                       AS away_team_id,
  teams.away.name                     AS away_team_name,
  goals.home                          AS home_goals,
  goals.away                          AS away_goals,
  CASE
    WHEN goals.home > goals.away  THEN 'home_win'
    WHEN goals.home < goals.away  THEN 'away_win'
    WHEN goals.home = goals.away  THEN 'draw'
    ELSE 'pending'
  END                                 AS result
FROM raw
WHERE fixture.status.short = 'FT'  -- matchs terminés seulement

-- Forme sur les 5 derniers matchs par équipe
WITH home_matches AS (
  SELECT home_team_id AS team_id, match_date, result AS team_result
  FROM `football-dashboard-490415`.`football_curated`.`stg_fixtures`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT away_team_id, match_date,
    CASE result
      WHEN 'away_win' THEN 'home_win'
      WHEN 'home_win' THEN 'away_win'
      ELSE result
    END
  FROM `football-dashboard-490415`.`football_curated`.`stg_fixtures`
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY team_id ORDER BY match_date DESC) AS rn
  FROM home_matches
)
SELECT
  team_id,
  COUNTIF(team_result = 'home_win' AND rn <= 5) AS wins_last5,
  COUNTIF(team_result = 'draw' AND rn <= 5)     AS draws_last5,
  COUNTIF(team_result = 'away_win' AND rn <= 5) AS losses_last5
FROM ranked
GROUP BY team_id

select fixture_id
from `football-dashboard-490415`.`football_curated`.`stg_fixtures`
where fixture_id is null

with all_values as (

    select
        result as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from `football-dashboard-490415`.`football_curated`.`stg_fixtures`
    group by result

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'home_win','away_win','draw'
)

select home_goals
from `football-dashboard-490415`.`football_curated`.`stg_fixtures`
where home_goals is null

with dbt_test__target as (

  select fixture_id as unique_field
  from `football-dashboard-490415`.`football_curated`.`stg_fixtures`
  where fixture_id is not null

)

select
    unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from dbt_test__target
group by unique_field
having count(*) > 1
